channelId.title: Slack Channel ID
channelId.description: The Slack Channel ID to add people to.
channelId.einstein:description: The Slack Channel ID to add people to. A Slack Channel ID is represented as a string like C12345678. If a string like <#C123456789> is provided, extract a Slack Channel ID from it by removing the <# and > characters. For example, the Channel ID in <#C123456789> is C123456789.

userIds.title: Slack User IDs
userIds.description: A comma separated list of Slack User IDs to add to the provided Slack Channel.
userIds.einstein:description: A comma separated list of Slack User IDs to add to the provided Slack Channel. A single Slack User ID is represented as a string like U987654321. If a string like <@U987654321> is provided extract a Slack User ID from it by removing the <@ and > characters. For example, the Slack User in <@U987654321> is U987654321. The input here needs to be a comma separated list of Slack User IDs like U12345678,U987654321,U781345729.
